channel.title: Quality3Ds Daily Pulse
channel.description: Curated daily news for 3D printing enthusiasts.

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #142 - 2026-05-29
item.description:
🔥 New York's ban on 3D-printed guns sparks First Amendment concerns - USA Today New York's ban on 3D-printed guns sparks First Amendment concerns USA Today Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on May 28, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisAFBVV95cUxONnhXRmdSSE00NTh6UUdGSkxIOGZhdUs2aE1MM1lCbWRObFRUaTdjY1IzQ0xJNEl6SVpOcjR4QkRkNnZSTVlBeF8yRGNYSzhacnNJRGtlZDJTWktqcDBBWEZGbVhaZmVJWUh2MUctSno3MGpnREVVME9nS3JWaFZkajdqakN3eDdvdzloN0Vnb0VER2dXcWJOZFI1U3Y3cFJHTnUxZEdMZmJUaE9jYnFrWg?oc=5

🚨 Prusament Resin Model+: New generation resin with safer health profile and better impact resistance Meet Prusament Resin Model+, our reformulated SLA resin with faster exposure, better impact resistance, and reduced pigment sedimentation! The Prusament Model Resin has long been a flagship of our SLA lineup, reported by Prusa Blog on May 28, 2026. Image ? https://storage.googleapis.com/prusa3d-content-prod-14e8-wordpress-blog-prod/2026/05/7ade2335-prusamentresin_model_launch_blog-698x325.jpg Read more ? https://blog.prusa3d.com/prusament-resin-model-new-generation-resin-with-safer-health-profile-and-better-impact-resistance_136337

🚀 UT Austin researchers cut semiconductor fabrication time from days to minutes Researchers at the Cockrell School of Engineering at the University of Texas at Austin have developed a tabletop version of Extreme ultraviolet (EUV) lithography equipment by reducing the system to … The post UT... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 28, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/2026-ME-Chang-EUV-13-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/ut-austin-researchers-cut-semiconductor-fabrication-time-from-days-to-minutes

🚀 Decathlon brand launches KIPNEXT 3D sneaker made using MJF Nearly two decades ago, sporting goods retailer Decathlon created the Kiprun brand to drive innovation in running gear. Since then, the performance running brand has pushed the envelope for shoes, … The post Decathlon brand launches KIPNEXT 3D sneaker made using MJF appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/kiprun-3-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/decathlon-brand-launches-kipnext-3d-sneaker-made-using-mjf

🚀 ETH Zurich students fire 3D printed copper detonation rocket engine Students from the Aris Swiss student space initiative at ETH Zurich have produced stable detonation waves during ground testing of a Rotating Detonation Rocket Engine (RDRE), whose combustion chamber and … The post... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 28, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/ETH-Zurich-02-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/eth-zurich-students-fire-3d-printed-copper-detonation-rocket-engine

🚀 Mastrex launches $185,000 MX300 metal 3D printing system The MX300 boasts a 300 x 300 x 350 mm build volume and dual 500W lasers. Reported by TCT Magazine on May 28, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/05/MX300-press-release-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/mastrex-launches-185-000-mx300-metal-3d-printing-system

🏠 Metal Powder Works & Westinghouse Electric Company extent product development partnership WEC is said to have achieved successful results during previous phases of their collaboration, with the two companies now embarking on a scale-up of their efforts. Reported by TCT Magazine on May 28, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/05/0922-am-mpw-machine.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/metal-powder-works-westinghouse-electric-company-extent-product-development-partnership

🚀 amsight & toolcraft target semiconductor space with automated AM quality management approach The companies hope it will be more transparent and scalable than current methods and processes. Reported by TCT Magazine on May 28, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/05/amsight-vor-Anlage-Produktion_manifold4-2-1.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/amsight-toolcraft-target-semiconductor-space-with-automated-am-quality-management-approach

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #141 - 2026-05-28
item.description:
🔥 NSF Backs UNF Research to Stamp Out Defects in Metal 3D Printing - 3D Printing Industry NSF Backs UNF Research to Stamp Out Defects in Metal 3D Printing 3D Printing Industry Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on May 27, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirAFBVV95cUxQeEk4VXlzYUp3bDBhYXFTRHV5Sy1WTjVMdV9mQ2JPLVVpS3FTaTV5THB2bGFtVzgzU0pRc0U2SUZ6UW5sd0hyMTg2WFhSSW1RWC1WVGpmNGpqWG5OcFdSV3psQkc2UTVRb2tyT1BVbDhQMGtyUFNVVXlGYWR4RkotS0JmbkppU1VJUVJvRDI3VC1xbU14Z2dpUXFJQm5Rc3cyZjRfN1hTRGJtanlD?oc=5

🚨 UltiMaker Unveils Factor 4 Plus, a High-Speed Industrial 3D Printer with Automated Quality Validation - designnews.com UltiMaker Unveils Factor 4 Plus, a High-Speed Industrial 3D Printer with Automated Quality Validation designnews.com Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on May 26, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

🔥 NY moves to ban 3D printers that make guns, but can it be enforced? - MSN NY moves to ban 3D printers that make guns, but can it be enforced? Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on May 27, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

🖨 K3D adds two more MetalFab 3D printers "Ideal for large products, but also for series production of smaller parts, they are a perfect addition to our existing machines." Reported by TCT Magazine on May 27, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/05/DSC_3789.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/k3d-adds-two-more-metalfab-3d-printers

🖨 Nano Dimension Takes Substantial Loss on Sale of Markforged to Stratasys Israeli 3D printer manufacturer Nano Dimension has agreed to sell its Markforged subsidiary to rival 3D printing company Stratasys in an all-cash deal worth $42.5 million. With this move, the Israeli manufacturer is shedding one of its cash-burning business units as it works through a restructuring plan, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 27, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Markforged-HQ.-Photo-via-Businesswire-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/nano-dimension-takes-substantial-loss-on-sale-of-markforged-to-stratasys-251862

🏠 Metal Powder Works and Westinghouse extend nuclear AM powders contract Metal Powder Works, a Pittsburgh-based specialty materials company, has entered the third phase of its product development program with Westinghouse Electric Company (WEC), extending a multi-year collaboration... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 27, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Metal-Powder-Works-facility-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/metal-powder-works-westinghouse-nuclear-am-powders

🚀 Snowbird Technologies to Demonstrate Field-Ready Manufacturing at RIMPAC 2026 Defense and space manufacturing company Snowbird Technologies has been confirmed as a participant in the 30th Rim of the Pacific Exercise (RIMPAC) 2026. The company will take part through the Naval Postgraduate School’s Consortium for Advanced Manufacturing Research and Education (NPS CAMRE) and its distributed advanced manufacturing experiment—one of the exercise’s, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 27, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/MELTIO-METAL-AM-SOLUTION-DURING-RIMPAC-DEFENSE-EXERCISE-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/snowbird-technologies-to-demonstrate-field-ready-manufacturing-at-rimpac-2026-251829

🏠 New Cedar Concrete 3D Printer: Technical Specifications and Pricing Holcim and British International Investment’s (BII) joint venture 14Trees and Chennai-based Tvasta Manufacturing Solutions have jointly developed Cedar concrete 3D printer designed for large-scale construction... Cedar is designed to work with locally available concrete mixes rather than the proprietary mortar-based materials that many existing 3D concrete printing systems require, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 27, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/cedar_name-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/new-cedar-concrete-3d-printer-technical-specifications-and-pricing-251809

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #140 - 2026-05-27
item.description:
🚨 UltiMaker Targets Defense Manufacturing With New Factor 4 Plus UltiMaker has announced the new Factor 4 Plus. The printer, which sits above the S series, has a 330 x 240 x 300 mm build volume and a 120-kilo dual-nozzle, reported by 3DPrint.com on May 26, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/326230/ultimaker-targets-defense-manufacturing-with-new-factor-4-plus

📰 ORNL develops real-time composite 3D printing error correction system Researchers at the US Department of Energy’s (DOE) Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL) have developed an automated controller capable of detecting and correcting temperature errors during large-scale plastic... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 26, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/2025-P11622_0-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/ornl-develops-real-time-composite-3d-printing-error-correction-system

🚀 Sinterit launches compact SLS platform powered by a 30W RF CO₂ laser The €47,000 machine has been developed in response to growing demand for greater material freedom and more advanced process control. Reported by TCT Magazine on May 26, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/05/PR-BIANCO2-image-1-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/sinterit-launches-compact-sls-platform-powered-by-a-30w-rf-co2-laser

📰 ROBOZE to conduct research into Carbon–Carbon & Ceramic Matrix Composites with Swiss university Carbon–Carbon and CMC are known for their exceptional resistance to ultra-high temperatures, thermal shock, and aggressive operating conditions. Reported by TCT Magazine on May 26, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/05/0422-am-roboze-argo-500.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/roboze-to-conduct-research-into-carbon-carbon-ceramic-matrix-composites-with-swiss-university

📰 Hyperion Systems 3D prints 4.6m hull for ASTRA 460 USV This week at the Indian Ocean Defence and Security Conference (IODS) in Perth, Australia, Hyperion Systems is making quite the splash. There, the Australian LFAM specialist is not only publicly … The post Hyperion Systems 3D prints 4.6m hull for ASTRA 460 USV appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/hyperion-systems-1-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/hyperion-systems-3d-prints-4-6m-hull-for-astra-460-usv

🚀 ROBOZE and SUPSI launch R&D initiative targeting Carbon–Carbon and Ceramic Matrix Composites ROBOZE and SUPSI, the University of Applied Sciences and Arts of Southern Switzerland, through its Institute of Mechanical Engineering and Materials Technology (MEMTi), formed a joint research and development... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 26, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/roboze-argo-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/roboze-and-supsi-launch-rd-initiative-targeting-carbon-carbon-and-ceramic-matrix-composites

🚀 Xenia launches thermoplastic composite pellet range for large-scale additive manufacturing Xenia, an Italian developer of carbon and glass fiber-reinforced thermoplastic composites, has released a new line of pellet-based materials engineered for large-scale additive manufacturing (LSAM) tooling applications. The portfolio addresses … The post Xenia launches thermoplastic composite pellet range for large-scale additive manufacturing appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/xenia_img1-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/xenia-launches-thermoplastic-composite-pellet-range-for-large-scale-additive-manufacturing

🚀 Sinterit launches BIANCO2 compact SLS 3D printer for colorable and white materials Sinterit introduced the BIANCO2, a compact CO₂ selective laser sintering 3D printer designed for companies requiring broader material options and tighter process control than standard compact SLS systems offer. The … The post Sinterit launches BIANCO2 compact SLS 3D printer for colorable and white materials appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/BIANCO2-newsletter-picture-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/sinterit-launches-bianco2-compact-sls-3d-printer-with-support-for-colorable-and-white-materials

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #139 - 2026-05-26
item.description:
🔥 The Growing Family Tree of Slic3r-Based Software With the controversy over open-source 3D print slicing software continuing, I thought I’d check on the current state of these tools. The post The Growing Family Tree of Slic3r-Based Software appeared on Fabbaloo. Read more ? https://www.fabbaloo.com/news/the-growing-family-tree-of-slic3r-based-software

🚀 The thermal barrier holding back metal AM may finally have a solution Before you print, find out if it’s worth it Aibuild, a software company serving the additive manufacturing industry, has just launched a tool called FETS. It is a thermomechanical finite … The post The thermal barrier holding back metal AM may finally have a solution appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Zrzut-ekranu-2026-05-24-233006-150x150.png Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/the-thermal-barrier-holding-back-metal-am-may-finally-have-a-solution

🚀 SHINING 3D’s FreeScan Trak quantifies hull geometry for aluminum electric catamaran Hangzhou-based engineer and sailor Hu Wei has invested tens of millions of RMB into the HighWei 66, an electric catamaran built around variable-pitch electric propulsion, solar power generation, and regenerative …... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 25, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Shining-3D-aluminum-hull-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/shining-3ds-freescan-trak-quantifies-hull-geometry-for-aluminum-electric-catamaran

📰 Youtube inventor 3D prints multi-purpose suitcase Matty Benedetto, a Youtuber and self-made inventor who, in his words, “designs products to solve problems that don’t exist” has created a 3D printed suitcase that, frankly, puts other luggage … The post Youtube... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 25, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/3d-printed-suitcase-4-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/youtube-inventor-3d-prints-multi-purpose-suitcase

💻 Axtra3D: a unified, traceable workflow for polymer AM Founded just five years ago, North Carolina-based Axtra3D has progressed rapidly in its mission of becoming a global, production-focused additive manufacturing company. Not only has Axtra3D developed and brought to … The post Axtra3D: a unified, traceable workflow for polymer AM appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Axtra3D-polymer-eBook-04-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/axtra3d-a-unified-traceable-workflow-for-polymer-am

💻 Airtech and Evergreen Additive sign exclusive supply agreement for maritime LFAM Airtech Advanced Materials Group and Evergreen Additive entered into an exclusive supply agreement on May 20, targeting LFAM applications in the maritime and defense sectors. Under the deal, Airtech will … The post Airtech and Evergreen Additive sign exclusive supply agreement for maritime LFAM appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Evergreen-founding-team-150x150.png Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/airtech-and-evergreen-additive-sign-exclusive-supply-agreement-for-maritime-lfam

💻 EPFL team makes 70x efficiency gain in holographic volumetric 3D printing Researchers at the École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne (EPFL) have developed a volumetric 3D printing platform that it claims is 70 times more energy-efficient than previous techniques. The system uses … The post EPFL team makes 70x efficiency gain in holographic volumetric 3D printing appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/EPFL-holographic-volumetric-3D-printing-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/epfl-70x-efficiency-gain-holographic-volumetric-3d-printing

🖨 Color 3D printing, from voxel-level jetting to sub-$500 filament extrusion For most of additive manufacturing’s history, printing in full color meant accessing a short list of expensive, specialized systems. Attempts have been made to reduce the cost of color 3D … The post Color 3D printing, from voxel-level jetting to sub-$500 filament extrusion appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/color-3D-printing-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/color-3d-printing-from-voxel-level-jetting-to-sub-500-filament-extrusion

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #138 - 2026-05-25
item.description:
🔥 New video of melted Bambu Lab A1 sparks debate about whether the 3D printer is still a fire hazard — critics push for recall while redditors suspect external factors - Tom's Hardware New video of melted Bambu Lab A1 sparks debate about whether the 3D printer is still a fire hazard — critics push for recall while redditors suspect external factors Tom's Hardware Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on May 24, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

🚀 Creality goes public: a $177 million bet on the future of consumer 3D printing A decade of growth, one long road to the IPO Shenzhen Creality 3D Technology, the world’s largest consumer 3D printing company by cumulative shipments, has officially launched its IPO on … The post Creality goes... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 24, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Zrzut-ekranu-2026-05-24-131921-150x150.png Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/creality-goes-public-a-177-million-bet-on-the-future-of-consumer-3d-printing

🦺 Hadassah doctors rebuild and lengthen leg using 3D printed implants Doctors at Hadassah Ein Kerem in Jerusalem have reconstructed a patient’s hip joint and femur using two custom 3D printed implants, after a rare condition caused her bones to progressively … The post Hadassah doctors... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 24, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Hadassah-implant-02-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/hadassah-doctors-rebuild-and-lengthen-leg-using-3d-printed-implants

📰 Fitasy brings single-shoe purchasing to its 3D printed footwear platform Fitasy, an Indianapolis-based custom-fit footwear company, has updated its on-demand production platform to accept orders for individual shoes through its website, fitasy.com. The option targets customers who require only one … The post Fitasy brings single-shoe purchasing to its 3D printed footwear platform appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Fitasy-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/fitasy-brings-single-shoe-purchasing-to-its-3d-printed-footwear-platform

🚀 NP Aerospace Produces Mastiff Suspension Carrier via WAAM, Cutting Lead Times by 50% NP Aerospace, working with the Digital Manufacturing Centre (DMC), has used Caracol‘s Vipra AM platform to produce the Mastiff suspension and differential carrier, a structurally critical, load-bearing component for... Printed as a single piece without tooling in 60 hours, the component marks a direct challenge…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 24, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Mastiff-suspension-np-aerospace-dmc-caracol-waam-robotic-dual-use-transportation-1200x900-1-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/np-aerospace-produces-mastiff-suspension-carrier-via-waam-cutting-lead-times-by-50-251756

🚀 India’s First Four-Engine Cluster Firing Marks New Frontier for Agnikul Cosmos Agnikul Cosmos, the Chennai-based private launch startup, has reached another propulsion milestone: the simultaneous firing of four semi-cryogenic rocket engines, all of them 3D printed as individual, single-piece... According to Agnikul, the test is the first of its kind in India involving semi-cryogenic…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 24, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Screenshot-2026-05-22-at-16.21.59-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/indias-first-four-engine-cluster-firing-marks-new-frontier-for-agnikul-cosmos-251760

📰 Soiboi Soft: Making Soft Robotics & Microfluidics Genius Look Easy Many YouTubers are talking heads with a keyed-up, almost manic, enthusiasm. In 3D printing, some give useful reviews, reported by 3DPrint.com on May 24, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/325429/soiboi-soft-making-soft-robotics-microfluidics-genius-look-easy

🏠 APC PowerForge with Dell and NVIDIA at DTW 2026 - ServeTheHome APC PowerForge with Dell and NVIDIA at DTW 2026 ServeTheHome Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on May 24, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigwFBVV95cUxNMVNTOVNEMDdvVFJYalN3OUt2b3VSdnFVNGxUS2drTVU2TTZDNjNtRDZWVFpsdmxNWndjVUJXdHNMRFd4Yy1GbURrdHlpMXNnSjU2S3l5VXNtTFU2NmRYMFVBUmhFdklpSEoyUHhScjVCQU5kZTdBdmcxbjY2R3pEdy1Kaw?oc=5

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #137 - 2026-05-24
item.description:
🔥 ROBOZE Acquires Dimanex to Wire the Physical and Digital Sides of Manufacturing Together Italian advanced manufacturing company ROBOZE has acquired key assets from Dimanex, a Dutch software platform that filed for bankruptcy earlier this year. The deal brings Dimanex’s platform together with ROBOZE’s existing software tools, Pandora and SlizeR, closing a persistent gap in its ecosystem: connecting physical machines directly to digital inventory management, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 23, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/1778064707174-150x100.jpeg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/roboze-acquires-dimanex-to-wire-the-physical-and-digital-sides-of-manufacturing-together-251690

🔥 UNF secures NSF grant to tackle defects in laser powder bed fusion - VoxelMatters UNF secures NSF grant to tackle defects in laser powder bed fusion VoxelMatters Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on May 22, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

🦺 USC team prints MRI coils for just $30 per unit MRI coils — specialized antennas placed against the body to detect radiofrequency signals from tissue — currently cost between $10,000 and $50,000 each. They require complex manufacturing and follow rigid … The post USC team prints MRI coils for just $30 per unit appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/USC-Viterbi-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/usc-team-prints-mri-coils-for-just-30-per-unit

🚀 SHINING 3D releases Inspect 2026 with modular workflow architecture SHINING 3D has released Inspect 2026, an updated version of its 3D inspection software designed to give quality engineers and manufacturers greater flexibility across dimensional inspection and quality control tasks. … The post SHINING 3D releases Inspect 2026 with modular workflow architecture appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Automated-Inspection-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/shining-3d-releases-inspect-2026-with-modular-workflow-architecture

🖨 T.GOLD expands to two annual editions in 2026, with increased focus on 3D printing T.GOLD, the international trade show dedicated to machinery and technology for the jewelry and precious metals industry, returns to the Vicenzaoro exhibition center in Vicenza from September 4 to 8, 2026, … The post... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 23, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/FIERA_VICENZA_hall02-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/t-gold-expands-to-two-annual-editions-in-2026-with-increased-focus-on-3d-printing

🖨 i3D Manufacturing Acquires Burloak Technologies in New Deal i3D Manufacturing, a business unit within the BTX Precision group, has completed the acquisition of Burloak Technologies, a metal additive manufacturing specialist based in Oakville, Ontario. The move adds technical depth to i3D’s existing capabilities and marks BTX Precision’s first footprint outside the United States, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 23, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/OVERVIEW-1-1024x208-1-150x100.webp Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/i3d-manufacturing-acquires-burloak-technologies-in-new-deal-251654

💻 3D Prod and Sculpteo Merge to Scale AM in France French additive manufacturing providers 3D Prod and Sculpteo have announced a merger, with 3D Prod, backed by injection moulding firm Platex, acquiring Sculpteo from BASF New Business GmbH, which had held the company... Terms of the transaction were not disclosed, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 23, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/1778148198701-150x100.jpeg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/3d-prod-and-sculpteo-merge-to-scale-am-in-france-251695

🦺 Open Bionics Expands Hero FLEX to Above-Elbow Amputees with First Clinical Fitting in New York A New York-based physicist has made history as the world’s first above-elbow amputee to be fitted with a full-length, 3D printed bionic arm. Born with an amputation following a circulatory complication eight days after birth, Gowtham spent most of his life without a functional prosthetic, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 23, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/MGS_Dan-00032-copy-4-scaled-e1712314888150-1024x968-1-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/open-bionics-expands-hero-flex-to-above-elbow-amputees-with-first-clinical-fitting-in-new-york-251754

📰 Penn State’s 3D Printed CaroFlex Device Opens a New Front in Drug-Resistant Hypertension Nearly half of all adults in the United States live with hypertension, and for roughly one in ten of them, conventional drug treatments simply don’t work. A research team at Pennsylvania State University (PSU) has developed a potential answer: a soft, 3D printed bioelectronic device that attaches directly to one of the body’s most critical…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 21, 2026. The method, published in Cell Reports Physical Science, pairs a mathematical design algorithm with an electrochemical 3D printing process to fabricate pure copper cold plates,…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 19, 2026. The … The post Open Bionics fits first 3D printed full-length bionic arm appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing.
